name: Quesadillas with Brie and Plum Salsa
recipeIngredient: Jalapeno pepper, diced, or 1/4 tsp chili flakes
recipeInstructions:
- Brie cheese, 1 lb, rind removed
- Flour tortillas (10-inch), 8
- Butter for frying, 1/4 cup
1. To make salsa: Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and sauté until softened, about 2 minutes. Add jalapeno and plums and mix with onions. Stir in lime juice, bring to boil, then remove from heat. Stir in coriander, season with salt and pepper, and let cool.
2. Cut brie into strips. Place 1/4 cup of brie and 2 tablespoons of salsa on one half of a tortilla. Season to taste. Fold over, pressing edges together.
3. Heat butter in a skillet over high heat. Fry tortillas about 2 minutes per side until browned. Transfer to an oven preheated to 400°F (200°C) and keep warm. Alternatively, place quesadillas on an oiled cookie sheet, oil the tops, and bake for 10 minutes or until browned. Cut each tortilla into three wedges. These can be made ahead and reheated in a 350°F (180°C) oven until cheese melts.
